overview.value: Thales Alenia Space is a joint venture between Thales (67%) and Leonardo (33%), described as a global space manufacturer delivering solutions for telecommunications, navigation, Earth observation, environmental management, exploration, science and orbital infrastructures. The company says governments, institutions and companies rely on it to design, operate and deliver satellite-based systems that position and connect, observe the planet, and optimize the use of its resources.

focus.value: Space manufacturer for telecommunications, navigation, Earth observation, environmental management, exploration, science and orbital infrastructures

status.value: A Joint Venture between Thales (67%) and Leonardo (33%)
